name: Jin-le Kwon
description: A redheaded girl (inherited from her father) born to an American father and a Korean mother. During her early life, she lived with her mother in America. However, following a plane crash which resulted in her mother's death, her maternal grandfather took her in. She was trained in the Sun-Woo Clan's martial arts, and is said to be amongst the top five for her skills. At the start of New Waves, she is guarding Shi-Woon from other Schools that want to exact revenge on him for actions committed by

name: Jishuka
description: __Country:__ Brazil ~!She laters becomes a South Korean citizen!~ Jishuka, the Bow Saint-Legendary Archer, also known as Godly Archer, is a high-ranked and powerful User. She is a Legendary Class holder, one of the main pillars and the Duke of Overgeared Kingdom.

name: Johnny
description: The personification of "Watashi's" sex drive.
mediaTitles: The Night is Short, Walk on Girl
searchTerms: The Night is Short, Walk on Girl

name: Jou Koizumi
description: Mr. Koizumi is the Katase High School Table Tennis club advisor. He recognizes Smile's gift and ability towards the sport and so vows to train him. When Mr. Koizumi was younger he was considered to be the best table tennis player in Japan, and was nicknamed 'Butterfly Joe' because of his extraordinary skills. Mr. Koizumi states that Smile reminds him of his younger self. He is also an English teacher.

description: Empress of the Mulnite Empire. Hard to read and wanton in nature, she appoints the reclusive Komari as a Crimson Lord.

name: Kazuki Kuwanomi
description: Kazuki Kuwanomi is the director of field work, a Spotter at Terminal Service #1 and the second in power only to the manager of the department, Takao Yamanobe. She was previously Constance's partner, but recently became Isla's partner again. (Source: Plastic Memories Wiki)

name: Kimi
description: Kimi enjoys living with [Fuji](https://anilist.co/character/353780/Fuji) after she picks them up on a rainy night. They are curious and quick to act, as well as having an ability to understand human language and write notes.

name: Kurotsuchi
description: Kurotsuchi is a female shinobi who along with Akatsuchi escorts the Third Tsuchikage, who is her grandfather. She refers to Deidara as Deidara-nii (nii-san = big brother), either as family or a sign of respect. ~!Some time after the Fourth Shinobi World War her grandfather retired and she became the Fourth Tsuchikage!~

name: Labyrista
description: **Race:** Human

name: Manami Tamura
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Manami is Kyousuke's classmate and childhood friend. She usually behaves in a pretty traditional mindset, which Kyousuke made fun of her by calling her 'grandma'. In return, Manami calls him 'grandpa'. Kyousuke would sometime drop by her house for studying. ~!It has been revealed in episode 3 that she has a crush on Kyousuke for quite sometime now. She is yet to muster the courage to let him know how she feels through words. Thus, she has been trying her best to get Kyousuke's

name: Mysterious Heroine X
description: An unknown heroine who tasked herself in eliminating Saber-class heroines during Back Alley Satsuki - Chapter Heroine Sanctuary. Bearing the code name "A-X", X was a stranger who came from the "mysterious dimension" called the Servant Universe. Seeking to accomplish her "true, dearest wish" to "defeat all Sabers", she brandished Secret-Calibur and left her home town, leaving behind an "expression full of bitterness."
mediaTitles: Fate/Grand Order: You've Lost Ritsuka Fujimaru

name: Naomi Nakashima
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") Naomi is generally a bright and cheerful, if stubborn, teenage girl. A tomboy, she often feels the need to take charge of everything she is involved with, which usually causes her to butt heads with Satoshi Mochida. This behavior hides a more "girlish" side to her that enjoys shopping and grooming herself like other average girls her age, which shows itself whenever she plays with her friend Seiko Shinohara. She also tends to let her emotions control her actions: when s

name: Pluto
description: ~!Pluto is actually Sahad, a peaceful, quaint, robot with a strong affinity towards nature and who wished to fill his desolated country of Persia full of flowers. He was created by the Persian Minister of Science, Dr. Abullah. (Source: Astro Boy Wiki)!~

name: Ponko
description: The eldest daughter of the Tanuki Aliens, this name is a provisional term adapted to the Earth language. Although she disguises herself in a human-like form, her true appearance closely resembles a tanuki, with tail stripes similar to those of a raccoon. She is a curious and energetic girl. She admires Yachiyo, who scolded her, and begins working at the hotel. She excels in science and math subjects, and according to herself, she secretly entered the Imperial Capital Pompoko University’s Departm

name: Ricardo Martinez
nativeName: リカルド・マルチネス
description: Ricardo Martinez is currently the only 'Super Champion' in the series. He has the longest title run in the series, with 21 defenses of his WBA Featherweight Title over a decade. He became WBA Featherweight Champion at the age of 21. His fame is so great, even those in Mexico who don't know the President's name knows his name. Ricardo's strength far exceeds that of the other known featherweights. His power is on par with Ippo's; his damage retention allowed him to take several heavy blows from Da
mediaTitles: Hajime no Ippo: The Fighting! New Challenger
searchTerms: リカルド・マルチネス
Hajime no Ippo: The Fighting! New Challenger

name: Ryuu Natsume
description: A childish but mysterious rapper and member of The Cat's Whiskers. Ryu was found by Naoakira prior to the series. He is currently under Yohei's tutelage, training to be a bartender. Ryu is also good friends with Hokusai from Akan Yatsura. Ryu is an eccentric, energetic person, often saying nonsensical things and acting in a way that can be bewildering or annoying to others.

name: Ryuuto Kashima
description: Kashima has admired Shirakawa since the first year and got the lucky break of moving to the same class as her during the second year, turning simple admiration into a one-sided crush. Kashima never hoped to get more than that and was happy with keeping the status quo.
mediaTitles: Our Dating Story: The Experienced You and The Inexperienced Me

name: Sachiyuki Tokinaga
description: Tokinaga is a young male veterinarian who belongs to the Anti-God Science Institute, Anti-God Weapon Development Department, Biotechnology Section.

name: Saki Rukino
description: __Height:__ 163 cm A popular idol who has grown aloof due to her career being on hold. It's hinted that she may have romantic feelings for Haruto.
